final_prompt.prompt:
Create a lifestyle photo of Korean café-style iced coffee and dessert, shot on smartphone for Instagram sharing, then overlaid with meaningful hand-drawn annotations on each element, in the casual rough-note style of magazine editorials.

Style/medium: smartphone lifestyle photography with hand-drawn annotation overlay, the rough pen-and-ink honesty of editorial margin notes, Instagram Story casualness
Composition: top-down or slight angle smartphone shot, coffee and dessert as central subjects, generous negative space for annotation breathing room
Subject: iced coffee in glass with visible layers, Korean-style dessert (likely croffle or bingsu), clean café table surface
Scene/backdrop: minimalist Korean café interior, soft natural window light, no people
Lighting/mood: the gentle warmth of afternoon café light, quiet contentment of a solo treat
Color palette: warm cream and coffee brown in conversation with cool glass transparency, the comfort of a slow afternoon
Materials/textures: glossy iced coffee surface, crisp dessert texture, matte paper-like annotation lines
Text (verbatim): 日语手写注释 (平假名7成、简单汉字3成) — 饮料：「さっぱり」「やさしい甘み」 / 食物：「しっとり」「さいこう」 / 空间：「リラックス」「いい時間」 / 整体：「しあわせすぎる～」
Constraints: white thin hand-drawn lines like pen sketch, rough uneven one-stroke style, contour lines tracing object edges, arrows and dotted lines for eye guidance, steam/sparkles/hearts/emojis as decoration with留白, no people visible, smartphone camera aesthetic
Avoid: over-decorated chaos, losing the留白, professional studio lighting, Western café aesthetic, too much text
